requirements.requirement: Detroit Dynamo is the global public brand while existing functional route registrations remain available.
requirements.evidence: Checked src/App.jsx, index.html, public/manifest.json, shared navbar/footer, and src/lib/brand.js.

requirements.requirement: Detroit Dynamo is a full parallel site under /detroit-dynamo with its own layout, header, footer, and scoped styles.
requirements.evidence: Checked 17 required paths, DetroitDynamoLayout, header/footer, and scoped .dynamo-site styles.

requirements.requirement: Public Detroit Dynamo pages cover the requested home, training, youth, senior, tryout, team, schedule, camp, sponsor, about, and contact experiences.
requirements.evidence: Checked route manifest labels and Detroit Dynamo page source for the requested sections, CTAs, pathway language, live booking handoff, portal access, coach section, secondary training inquiry, tryout team-interest handoff, sponsor package handoff, camp/clinic interest handoff, contact topic handoff, and youth age-group handoff.

requirements.requirement: Detroit Dynamo forms include validation, loading, success, error states, all requested fields, and clean placeholder/Appwrite-ready lead persistence.
requirements.evidence: Checked DetroitDynamoLeadForm, detroitDynamoLeads helper, and page-level form usage for all variants.

requirements.requirement: Admin roles, modules, lead routing, Appwrite-ready schemas, and the lead intake function scaffold cover the requested club operating model.
requirements.evidence: Checked 18 models, 20 Appwrite collections, 7 roles, 16 modules, 16 module registry entries, 7 role permission rows, 7 access summaries, 16 action guard groups, 7 record draft maps, 3 admin record workspace fixtures, 12 lead pipeline stages, 4 pipeline-backed schemas, 7 lead intake success fixtures, 4 lead intake rejection fixtures, 6 pipeline action success fixtures, 3 pipeline action rejection fixtures, 6 admin module read success fixtures, 5 admin module read rejection fixtures, 6 admin role grant success fixtures, 6 admin role grant rejection fixtures, 6 admin module write success fixtures, 7 admin module write rejection fixtures, 7 claim-safety tracks, 9 promotion cutover tracks, 8 safeguarding tracks, 5 function scaffolds, and 8 backend activation steps.

requirements.requirement: Detroit Dynamo assets, preview metadata, sitemap-ready route metadata, aliases, redirect plan, and launch gates are in place without replacing LC root SEO.
requirements.evidence: Checked 7 assets, 16 sitemap routes, 4 aliases, 7 redirects, launch gates, 6 external confirmation registers, 6 payment/package gate tracks, 6 waiver gate tracks, 7 claim-safety tracks, 9 promotion cutover tracks, 13 launch evidence checklist items, 4 launch evidence action fixtures, 6 external confirmation action fixtures, 9 owner launch review sections, 13 owner evidence intake rows, 30 production-preview evidence tracks, 11 live readiness board rows, 31 launch artifact index items, 10 deployment readiness tracks, 10 Vercel preview runbook steps, 8 secret redaction rules, 9 external gate closure rows, 10 owner handoff packet sections, 11 owner signoff rows, 15 final acceptance rows, and 8 safeguarding tracks.

requirements.requirement: Repo has repeatable verification commands and the requested audit, issues, implementation, changes, features, remaining needs, testing, and next-step documentation.
Backend provisioning, payments, waivers/legal, league/facility confirmations, and launch approvals remain explicit external gates before full promotion.
requirements.evidence: Pending promotion gates: Data backend live, Payments approved, Waivers approved, League and facility facts confirmed, SEO and redirect launch approved.
